tools.name: tags.listTagsForResource
tools.description: Returns a list of the tags assigned to the specified resource.

tools.name: tags.tagResource
tools.description: Adds tags to the specified resource. You can specify one or more tags to add.

tools.name: tags.untagResource
tools.description: Removes tags from the specified resource. You can specify one or more tags to remove.
